search_document:
User Request: Most expensive products.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Most Expensive Products
Type: table
Description: List of products sorted by unit price
Title: Product Categories
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of products by category
Title: Total Inventory Value
Type: kpi
Description: Total value of all products in stock

sql_queries.title: Most Expensive Products
sql_queries.description: List of products sorted by unit price

sql_queries.title: Product Categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c."CategoryName", COUNT(p."ProductID") AS "ProductCount" FROM "Products" p JOIN "Categories" c ON p."CategoryID" = c."CategoryID" GROUP BY c."CategoryName"

sql_queries.title: Total Inventory Value
sql_queries.description: Total value of all products in stock
